title: Senior Software Engineer - IBM India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - IBM India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at IBM India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
